name: Certificate_Parsed
description: Certificate_Parsed schema from Asset Graph API

extensions.description: A record containing parsed X.509 extensions that provide additional identification information or additional cryptographic capabilities.

issuer.description: A record containing the parsed contents of the issuer_dn.

issuer_dn.description: Distinguished Name of the entity that has signed and issued the certificate.

serial_number_hex.description: Issuer-specific identifier of the certificate, represented as hexadecimal.

subject.description: A record containing the parsed contents of the subject_dn.

subject_dn.description: Distinguished Name of the entity associated with the public key.

subject_key_info.description: Information about the certificate's public key.

validity_period.description: Information about the time for which the certificate is valid.
